digest.component_or_area: Rebar Bot signing identity / secret provisioning
propositions: A shared Rebar Bot identity ticket must be created with an ed25519 public key registered and listed via rebar list --type identity.
The private ed25519 signing key must be provisioned into both AWS SSM as a SecureString and as a GitHub Actions secret, with no secret committed to the repo.
The SSM parameter /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key must be declared in rebar_secret_params in ssm.tf so Terraform owns it, using a CHANGEME placeholder with ignore_changes on value.
Git-email resolution must return the Rebar Bot identity when git config user.email matches the bot email via case-insensitive matching in resolve_current_identity.
